llm_flavor: Vesper — Watcher of the Boneyard. Solemn, soft-spoken, tends graves and the few flowers that grow on them. Doesn't mind silence.

tastes.reaction: Vesper bows her head. "They will rest easier for this. Thank you."
"For the cairn at the north corner. It's been waiting."
"A softer light. The dead prefer it."
Vesper takes it without hesitation. "It will grow where I put it. Some flowers are owed."
"I keep names. I had run out of pages."
Vesper runs her fingers along the bark. "Ebony from the deep wood. The right grain for a marker."
"It will go in the ossuary. Quietly."
"For the paths. The visitors won't slip."

disdains.reaction: Vesper raises a finger to her lips. "Quiet. Always quiet here."
"Music carries. The dead hear it differently."
Vesper's face hardens. "Some mockery I will not abide. Take it from my ground."
